entry.title: Bill 96 (Hawaiʻi County): — → Passed Second Reading
entry.content:
AMENDS CHAPTER 15, ARTICLE 7, SECTION 15-62, OF THE HAWAI‘I COUNTY CODE 1983 (2016 EDITION, AS AMENDED), RELATING TO THE VETERANS ADVISORY COMMITTEE

Amends the Veterans Advisory Committee to no longer require one representative each from the American Legion, Big Island National Guard Retirees Association, Big Island Retired Military Association, and Veterans of Foreign Wars, as well as eight at-large members.

Status: — → Passed Second Reading

Latest action: Council: Bill 96 passes second & final reading - 11/19/25

View on the council site

entry.title: New: Bill 96 (Hawaiʻi County) — On agenda 2025-11-19
entry.content:
AMENDS CHAPTER 15, ARTICLE 7, SECTION 15-62, OF THE HAWAI‘I COUNTY CODE 1983 (2016 EDITION, AS AMENDED), RELATING TO THE VETERANS ADVISORY COMMITTEE

Amends the Veterans Advisory Committee to no longer require one representative each from the American Legion, Big Island National Guard Retirees Association, Big Island Retired Military Association, and Veterans of Foreign Wars, as well as eight at-large members.

Latest action: On agenda 2025-11-19

View on the council site
